headline: Kraft Heinz (KHC) Is Among The Best Warren Buffett Stocks: Find Out Why
summary: The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) is included in our list of the best Warren Buffett stocks. Buffett added The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) to his portfolio in 2015, purchasing 325.63 million shares worth $22.98 billion, making the stock Warren Buffett’s 2nd-largest holding as of Q3 2015. However, Berkshire’s investment in the stock has shrunk to $7.90 […]

headline: Kraft Heinz: It Only Needs To Get Less Bad
summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) contrarian thesis: stabilization over growth. Turnaround plan, 7.3% yield, low EV/EBIT.
